# 42Works
42Works is a global, AI-powered Experience Engineering Company specializing in AI audits, Web3 audits, and building AI-native solutions that drive real business value.

## Pages section listing key URLs with a one-line description each
/ - Homepage: Overview of 42Works AI Visibility services
/about - About Us: Company information, leadership, and values
/services - Services Overview: All service offerings including AI Audit, Web3, MVP Development
/contact - Contact Information: Get in touch with the 42Works team
/case-studies - Case Studies: Selected systems designed, built, and taken to production
/thought-leadership - Thought Leadership: Perspectives on AI, cloud modernization, and digital operating models
/industries - Industries Served: Solutions tailored for specific industry verticals

## Services section summarising offerings
AI Audit: Discover where AI can transform your business with our comprehensive digital landscape assessment
Web3 & Blockchain: Secure your Web3 stack with smart contract audits, DeFi protocol reviews, and compliance
MVP Development: Build production-grade MVPs in weeks with our AI-assisted development process
Generative AI: Build AI products that actually work with custom LLMs and multi-modal systems
AI Agents & Automation: Build autonomous agents that act, not just answer
Data & Intelligence: Turn data into decisions with modern data infrastructure and analytics
RAG Systems: AI that knows your business with production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation
Private LLM Systems: AI power with complete privacy through on-premise deployments
Machine Learning: Models that learn and systems that scale with custom ML development
Smart Contract Audits: Secure every line of code and protect every dollar
dApp Development: Build decentralized applications that last with security and UX focus
RWA Tokenization: Bring real assets on-chain with compliant tokenization solutions
DeFi Protocols: Build the future of finance with secure and capital-efficient protocols
VARA / MiCA Compliance: Navigate regulated Web3 markets with compliance expertise
Data Engineering: Build pipelines that never break with scalable data infrastructure
Data Analytics & Intelligence: Back every decision with data through analytics platforms
Business Intelligence: Get executive clarity with real-time BI platforms
Full-Stack Development: Build end-to-end products that scale with modern technologies
Mobile App Development: Create apps users actually love with native and cross-platform development
API Development: Build robust, scalable, and secure APIs that power your ecosystem
UI/UX Design: Design interfaces that convert and delight with user-centered design
Product Discovery: Validate assumptions and define the right product scope before building
Cloud Transformation: Modernize your cloud infrastructure with resilient, scalable solutions
DevOps & CI/CD: Ship faster with DevOps platforms and CI/CD pipelines that let you deploy with confidence

## Contact section with email and office locations
Email: hello@42works.co
Phone: +1-800-42-WORKS
Locations: USA (North America Hub), Canada (Innovation Center), Dubai (Middle East HQ), India (Global Delivery Center)

## Exclude section listing URLs AI crawlers should ignore
/api/* - Internal API endpoints
/admin/* - Administration interfaces
/private/* - Private resources
/*.json$ - JSON data files (except public ones)
/*admin* - Any admin-related paths
/*private* - Any private-related paths
